title: Best Rainy Day Activities Across Switzerland
excerpt: Don't let the weather ruin your plans. These indoor activities are perfect when the rain hits.
author: Emma Clarke
content:
Rain in the Alps? No problem. Switzerland has world-class indoor activities that make rainy days something to look forward to.

## Museums
- **Swiss Museum of Transport, Lucerne** — Interactive and engaging for all ages
- **Kunsthaus Zürich** — World-class art collection
- **CERN Science Gateway, Geneva** — Free science exploration
- **Olympic Museum, Lausanne** — Sports history on the lake

## Thermal Baths & Spas
- **Thermalbad Zürich** — Rooftop pool in a converted brewery
- **Leukerbad Thermal Baths** — Alpine hot springs
- **Aquaparc Le Bouveret** — Massive water park

## Food Experiences
- **Läderach Chocolate Factory** — Chocolate making and tastings
- **Appenzell Show Dairy** — Watch cheese being made
- **Fondue in Gruyères** — The ultimate Swiss comfort food

## Adventures
- **Escape Rooms** — Multiple locations across Swiss cities
- **Indoor Bouldering** — Minimum in Zurich, Bloczone in Bern
- **Go-Karting** — Indoor tracks in Lyss and other locations
- **Technorama, Winterthur** — 500+ hands-on science experiments

**Weather tip:** Use our weather integration feature to see which activities match today's conditions. Rainy day? We'll highlight the best indoor options automatically.
